calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing In Support Of Request For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:47:17 p.m. and concluding at 1:51:18 p.m.

Plaintiff Timurs Maculins appearing represented by Darryl Yorkey, Esq.
Defendant Pavel Dertyshnikov not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted on pleadings .

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Timurs Maculins, and against Defendant Pavel Dertyshnikov, as follows:

1. Damages: $18,010.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $2,763.18
3. Costs: $578.00

Attorney fees waived.

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $21,351.18

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
